raw.subject: Happy New Year from The Feathered Dog Grooming Salon in Mount Zion
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed your Happy New Year post - it's great to see your team kicking off the year with enthusiasm!

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving some potential customers unaware of your services.

I sketched a homepage idea from your Facebook photos and posts, featuring a header highlighting your professional pet care in Mount Zion, along with a section showcasing your grooming services and a photo gallery from your posts.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/the-feathered-dog-grooming-salon-mount-zion

If you're interested in discussing how to bring this online, I'd be happy to provide more details on a simple project with a flat fee for local businesses. Feel free to reply or let's schedule a quick call to explore further.
